U

update(int, String) - Method in class Admin
OOP: Interface Implementation — update a resource.
update(int, String) - Method in interface Manageable
Update an existing resource.
updateClassroom(int, String, int) - Method in class BookingSystem
Updates a classroom's name and capacity (Admin only).
User - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a regular user (student/staff) in the system.
User(String, String, String) - Constructor for class User
Creates a new User.
UserFrame - Class in Unnamed Package
Main dashboard window for regular Users.
UserFrame(BookingSystem, User) - Constructor for class UserFrame
Creates the User dashboard.
